title: hopea nutans
intro: Hopea nutans, also known as the Borneo ironwood or ironwood tree, is a large evergreen tree native to Borneo and other parts of Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Hopea nutans lie in its heartwood, which contains high levels of lupeol and other terpenoids, providing anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hopea nutans include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The herbal preparations of Hopea nutans typically involve the heartwood being harvested, dried, and then used to create extracts, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
